settings.title: Settings
settings.keyStorageNote: Your key is held in an HttpOnly cookie encrypted on the server; the browser cannot read it. Submission uses end-to-end RSA+AES encryption — DevTools Network only shows ciphertext.
settings.replaceKeyHint: Leave blank and save to keep the existing key
settings.legacyKeyMigrated: For stronger security, legacy plaintext API keys have been cleared. Please re-enter them via the gear icon.
settings.saveError: Save failed, please try again later
settings.clearError: Failed to clear keys, please try again later
settings.autoTriggerNote: After the app opens, if the trigger time has passed and today's fetch hasn't run, it will execute once automatically.
settings.enterKeyFirst: Enter your API Key to load available models

briefingFeed.noApiKeyHint: Click the gear icon in the top right and enter your API Key to enable daily briefing and trending repos

index.noTopicHint: No topics configured. Click the sidebar to add one.

briefing.noSourceUrl: No news source URLs configured. Add websites in topic settings.
briefing.autoFetchNote: Content will be auto-fetched daily at {time}

trending.fetchError: Failed to fetch trending repos. Please try again later.

topicForm.keywordPlaceholder: Type a keyword then press Enter
topicForm.githubKeywordPlaceholder: Type a keyword then press Enter
topicForm.keywordsTooltip: The AI engine will prioritize articles containing these keywords. Recommended: topic-related terms.
topicForm.githubKeywordsTooltip: Multiple keywords are combined with AND to search GitHub repos. Phrases with spaces are auto-quoted.
topicForm.urlsTooltip: News data sources. Recommended: pages with article listings for best AI summarization results.

error.noUrls: No website sources configured for this topic
error.noContent: Unable to fetch content from any source. Please check your URLs.
error.noArticles: AI could not identify any articles from the page content

bookmarks.empty: No bookmarks yet. Click the bookmark icon while browsing to save items.
